ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient (e.g., healthcare worker, teacher) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the patient */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has diabetes */,
  "chd" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has coronary heart disease (CHD) */,
  "htn" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has hypertension (HTN) */,
  "cancer" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has cancer */,
  "asthma" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has asthma */,
  "copd" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) */,
  "autoimmune_dis" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has an autoimmune disorder */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is a smoker */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* COVID-19 vaccination status of the patient */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the patient's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who took the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., SARS COV2 NAAT) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, Antigen) */,
  "swab_type" TEXT /* Type of swab used (e.g., Nasopharyngeal) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Negative, Positive) */,
  "batch_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_provider" TEXT /* Entity that provided the test */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was available */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional remarks or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient experiencing the symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom (e.g., cough, fever) */,
  "symptom_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "days_since_onset" INTEGER /* Number of days since symptom onset */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the symptom was reported */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the symptom resolved, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
column_names: Occupation of the patient (e.g., healthcare worker, teacher)
Whether the patient has coronary heart disease (CHD)
Whether the patient has chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD)
Whether the patient has an autoimmune disorder
Whether the patient is a smoker
COVID-19 vaccination status of the patient

Location where the test was conducted

Date the symptom resolved, if applicable
